steps.title: Set up the angle relationship
steps.content: Each obtuse angle is supplementary to the acute, so obtuse $=180-(7x-400)$. The sum of one acute and three obtuse equals $$(7x-400)+3[180-(7x-400)] = 540 - 2(7x-400).$$

steps.title: Solve for the requested measure
steps.content: Simplify: $540 - 14x + 800 = -14x + 1340$. Matching $-14x+w$ gives $$w = 1340.$$ The answer is 1340.
